query:
ALTER TABLE `accommodation_assignments` MODIFY COLUMN `roomType` enum('single','double','twin','suite','family','dormitory') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'twin';
ALTER TABLE `accommodation_assignments` ADD COLUMN `accommodationType` enum('hotel','villa','apartment','resort','pension','other') DEFAULT 'hotel' NOT NULL;
